    • condIncl

Statically typed ast for subset of HTML

Originally implemented to generate graphviz html-like labels.

Imports

helpers, hexceptions, hprimitives, colorstring, xml_ast

Types

RawHtml = distinct string
Xml = XmlNode
HtmlElemKind = enum
  hekTable, hekRow, hekCell, hekElemList, hekImage, hekOther, hekText, hekRaw
HtmlTextProp = enum
  htpNone, htpBold, htpUnderline, htpItalic
HtmlElem = ref object
  elements*: seq[HtmlElem]
  attrs*: StringTableRef
  class*: seq[string]
  case kind*: HtmlElemKind
  of hekTable:
      border*: int
      bgcolor*: Color
      height*: int
      width*: int

  of hekText:
      textProps*: set[HtmlTextProp]
      textColor* {...}{.requiresinit.}: Color
      textColorBg* {...}{.requiresinit.}: Color
      textStr*: string
      textPre*: bool

  of hekCell:
      cellColor*: Color
      cellBgColor*: Color
      cellSize*: ArrSize
      dotPort*: int

  of hekOther:
      tagname*: string

  of hekRaw:
      rawstr*: RawHtml

  else:
      nil

Consts

xmlSeqTag = "xml-seq-tag-ignore-when-export"

Procs

proc toPrettyStr(n: XmlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc toFlatStr(n: XmlNode; escape: bool = true): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc toPrettyStr(n: HtmlElem): string {...}{.raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}
proc toFlatStr(n: HtmlElem; escape: bool = true): string {...}{.raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect].}
proc toPrettyStr(n: fus_xmltree.XmlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

    tags: [].}

                props: set[HtmlTextProp] = {}; bgColor: Color = colNoColor): HtmlElem {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}

             attrs: openArray[(string, string)] = @[]): HtmlElem {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}

                 description: Option[seq[HtmlElem]] = none(seq[HtmlElem])): HtmlElem {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}

    raises: [], tags: [].}
func wrap(xml: HtmlElem; tag: string): HtmlElem {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func wrap(xml: seq[HtmlElem]; tag: string): HtmlElem {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func add2(result: var string; n: XmlNode; level = 0; indWidth = 2;
          addNewLines = true; escape: bool = true) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func toXml(html: HtmlElem): seq[XmlNode] {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
func `$`(html: HtmlElem): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
func toHtmlDoc(html: HtmlElem): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
func toDocument(html: HtmlElem; styleSection: string = ""): string {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}
func toDocument(html: seq[HtmlElem]; styleSection: string = ""): string {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}

    tags: [].}
func toHtml(strs: openArray[ColoredString]; selector: bool = true): HtmlElem {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}

    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}

          addNewLines = true; escape: bool = true) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
